# PantryPal Current State

Version: v1.0.0

Implemented

- Pantry inventory
- AI receipt scanning
- AI recipe generation
- Grocery list
- Pantry Score
- Staples dashboard
- Local preferred stores
- Cabin UI Rewrite with polished mobile-first layout
- Dark pine green header and bottom phone navigation
- Cream rounded cards and warmer horizontal log cabin interior styling
- Shopping recommendation card with trip-value placeholder
- Rush City theme
- Mild recipe preferences
- Quantity tracking
- Partial consumption
- Supabase backend
- Netlify deployment

Not yet implemented

- Live grocery prices
- Weekly ads
- Price history
- Smart shopping optimizer calculations
- Meal planner calendar
- Household accounts
- Barcode scanner
- Receipt OCR history
